scripts.test:unit: node scripts/test-livesession.mjs && node scripts/test-nutrition.mjs && node scripts/test-progress.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/e2e-setup.mjs && node scripts/e2e-builder.mjs && node scripts/e2e-planner.mjs && node scripts/e2e-live.mjs && node scripts/e2e-nutrition.mjs && node scripts/e2e-progress.mjs
scripts.native:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.native:ios: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.native:android: npm run native:sync && npx cap open android
